stylistic.title: Style & opinions
stylistic.intro: Opinionated style rules, off by default. Turn on only what your team agrees to. Conflicting choices are grouped so you pick one.

desc.ordering_sorting: Sorts members, parameters, fields, and map keys for predictable layout. Very noisy on existing code — best on new code or small repos.
desc.naming_conventions: Naming for files, methods, exceptions, callbacks, and Bloc events and state. Can be noisy on large codebases; enable incrementally.
desc.boolean_naming: Booleans must use is/has/can/should prefixes so intent is clear in conditionals and APIs.
desc.code_style_preferences: How returns, conditionals, and loops are written — immediate return, for-in, getter vs method, and similar shorthands.
desc.function_parameter_style: Arrow functions when concise, all-named parameters, inline callbacks, and no parameter reassignment.
desc.widget_style: Flutter widget choices — SizedBox.square, center over align, spacing over SizedBox, and avoiding shrinkWrap in scrolls. Flutter projects only.
desc.class_record_style: Class vs record return types, private underscore prefixes, and explicit this where it clarifies.
desc.formatting: Blank-line placement, trailing commas, and literal and comment style. Can be noisy — many files may need edits.
desc.comments_documentation: TODO and FIXME format, sentence case, a period after doc comments, /// over //, and no commented-out code.
desc.testing_style: Prefer expect over assert in tests so a failure shows expected vs actual.
desc.debug_test_utility: Test helpers such as prefer_fail_test_case that fail loudly when a test hits an unexpected path.
desc.opinionated_rules: Assorted style choices — concise names, exhaustive enums, guard clauses, positive conditions, and more. Many rules; can be noisy.

packs.forYourProjectHint: Packs whose dependency or SDK matches your pubspec. These rules apply to code you actually ship.
packs.noneDetected: No packs match your dependencies yet. Add a supported package, or open All packages below.
packs.allPackagesHint: Every available pack, including ones not detected in this project. Enable a pack to opt into its rules.

domainDesc.state-management: Bloc, Riverpod, Provider, GetX, and related state and dependency-injection libraries.
domainDesc.networking-apis: HTTP clients, GraphQL, Firebase, Supabase, and connectivity.
domainDesc.storage-persistence: Local databases and key-value stores — Drift, Hive, Isar, sqflite, shared_preferences.
domainDesc.navigation-deep-links: Routing and deep-link handling — auto_route, go_router, app_links, url_launcher, and webview.
domainDesc.media-graphics: Images, SVG, animation, audio, maps, pickers, and the Flame engine.
domainDesc.device-platform: Sensors, location, permissions, biometrics, notifications, and background work.
domainDesc.identity-sharing: Sign-in providers, sharing, and in-app review.
domainDesc.utilities-config: Cross-cutting helpers — UUIDs, environment config, fonts, and collection compatibility.
domainDesc.sdk-migrations: Dart and Flutter version-upgrade rules that flag APIs removed or deprecated in a given SDK.

scanning.heading: Pag-scan ng mga pakete
scanning.body1: Kinukuha ni Saropa ang metadata ng pub.dev, aktibidad ng GitHub, at mga graph ng dependency para sa bawat direktang dependency sa proyektong ito.
scanning.body2: Awtomatikong magre-refresh ang page na ito kapag natapos na ang pag-scan. Maaari kang magkansela mula sa notification ng pag-usad sa kanang ibaba.

summary.caveatLine1: *Mga ipinapakitang laki ng code (lib + idineklarang asset), bumabalik sa laki ng archive ng pub.dev kapag hindi available ang laki ng code. Hindi kasama ang dev_dependencies (build_runner, lints, saropa_lints, atbp.) — hinding-hindi sila nagpapadala sa APK / IPA / web bundle. Ang aktwal na laki ng app ay magiging mas maliit pagkatapos ng pagyanig ng puno.
summary.caveatLine2: Mga threshold ng aktibidad: 90d = lipas, 180d = tulog (commit + release timeline).

breakdown.thresholdsHeading: Paano nagmamapa ang mga marka sa mga marka
breakdown.thresholdB: 40–69 — Matatag: pinananatili pa rin ngunit bumabagal
breakdown.thresholdC: 20–39 — Luma na: mahabang agwat sa pagitan ng mga release
breakdown.thresholdE: below 20 — Inabandona: mga palatandaan ng kawalan ng aktibidad
breakdown.thresholdF: Itinigil o na-archive sa pub.dev (hindi nagamit ang marka)

table.expanderAriaExpanded: Itago ang mga detalye ng isyu
table.detailHeading: Bakit nakakuha ng {score} ang function na ito
table.detailNoIssues: Walang mga flag sa row na ito — ang marka ay hinihimok ng mga value ng column sa itaas (paggamit, saklaw, pagiging kumplikado, edad, dokumentasyon).
table.suppressTooltip: Isinulat ang `// ignore_for_file: code_health:<flag>` sa file na ito upang maalis ng mga pag-scan sa hinaharap ang flag na ito para sa buong file.

unused.label: hindi nagamit
unused.rule: Na-flag kapag walang ibang file na tumutukoy sa pangalan ng function na ito.

uncovered.label: walang takip
uncovered.rule: Na-flag kapag nag-ulat ang LCOV ng 0% line coverage.

complex.label: kumplikado
complex.rule: Na-flag kapag lumampas sa 10 ang cyclomatic complexity.

undocumented.label: hindi dokumentado
undocumented.rule: Na-flag kapag ang isang kumplikadong function (CC > 10) ay walang komento sa doc.

test_drift.label: pagsubok drift
test_drift.rule: Na-flag kapag ang pinakabagong naka-link na test file ay makabuluhang mas luma kaysa sa source file ng function.

stub_tested.label: stub-tested
stub_tested.rule: Na-flag kapag may umiiral na naka-link na pagsubok ngunit halos walang iginigiit.

suspicious_coverage.label: kahina-hinalang coverage
suspicious_coverage.rule: Na-flag kapag nag-ulat ang LCOV ng mataas na saklaw ngunit walang pagsubok na tumutukoy sa function.

shortcuts.clearFilter: I-clear ang nakatutok na row filter
shortcuts.activateKpi: I-activate ang nakatutok na KPI card
shortcuts.activateKpiSpace: I-activate ang nakatutok na KPI card
shortcuts.showOverlay: Ipakita ang shortcut na overlay na ito

suppressionsStrip.noData: Wala pang violations.json — magpatakbo ng pagsusuri upang i-populate ang snapshot ng pagsugpo.
suppressionsStrip.zeroTotal: 0 na pagsugpo sa analyzer sa pinakabagong pag-export.
suppressionsStrip.noKindBreakdown: Walang by-kind breakdown sa export na ito.
suppressionsStrip.title: Mga pagsugpo (export)
suppressionsStrip.readOnlyNote: (read-only; buksan ang Findings para mag-browse at kumilos.)

configMirrors.noFileRisk: Walang pagkasira ng panganib sa bawat file (walang mga paglabag sa saklaw).
configMirrors.suppressionNote: Tumutugma sa buod ng violations.json, hindi sa mga toggle ng live na pagsugpo sa sidebar.
configMirrors.noSuppression: Walang pinagsama-samang pagsugpo sa pag-export na ito (mas lumang analyzer o zero suppression).
configMirrors.owaspSignal: {count} na paglabag sa export na ito ay may dalang OWASP mobile/web mapping — buksan ang Security Posture para sa buong matrix at pag-export.

telemetry.resetTitle: I-reset ang lahat ng mga counter
telemetry.refreshTitle: I-reload ang mga telemetry counter mula sa disk
telemetry.emptyMessage: Wala pang naitala na mga telemetry event — magbukas ng panuntunan mula sa Findings Dashboard para simulan ang pagkuha ng mga counter.
telemetry.copiedJson: Saropa Lints: kinopya ang nauugnay na panuntunan telemetry JSON.
telemetry.countersReset: Saropa Lints: kaugnay na panuntunan telemetry counter reset.

sidebarLayout.hint: I-on o i-off dito ang mga seksyon ng aktibidad-bar ng Saropa (naka-save kasama ang workspace, nang hindi umaalis sa dashboard).

securityPosture.violationTooltip: {count} na paglabag sa {ruleCount} na rule. I-click para makita sa Issues.
securityPosture.noViolationsTooltip: Walang mga paglabag na nakamapa sa kategoryang ito.

empty.message: Walang napiling mga pakete para sa paghahambing. I-right-click ang dalawa o higit pang mga pakete sa dashboard ng Package at piliin ang {compare}.

shortcuts.showOverlay: Ipakita ang shortcut na overlay na ito

kpi.leadingTitle: Package na nangunguna sa karamihan ng mga panalo sa dimensyon.
kpi.packagesTitle: Bilang ng mga pakete na inihambing sa tabi-tabi.
kpi.dimensionsTitle: Bilang ng mga dimensyon kung saan maaaring mai-rank ang isang panalo.

toolbar.packageDashboardTitle: Buksan ang Package Dashboard para maghambing ng higit pang mga package.

empty.selectPackage: Pumili ng package para makita ang mga detalye

suggestion.unused: Mukhang hindi nagamit ang package na ito — isaalang-alang ang pag-alis nito.

community.activity90d: 90d: Isinara ang mga isyu sa {closed}, pinagsama ang mga {merged} PR

dormancy.noActivity6mo: Walang commit at walang release sa loob ng 6+ na buwan
dormancy.noActivity3mo: Walang commit at walang release sa loob ng 3+ na buwan
dormancy.codeInactive: Aktibo ang pagpapalabas, hindi aktibo ang code (3+ buwan nang walang commit)
dormancy.releaseSlower: Aktibo ang code, mas mabagal ang ritmo ng paglabas (3+ buwan)

enableRule.done: Enabled rule {ruleId}. Re-run analysis to apply.
enableRule.noWorkspace: Open a workspace folder to enable a rule.

openFinding.noWorkspace: Open a workspace folder to open a finding.

crashNudge.message: Log Capture saw a crash {count} time(s) that rule {ruleId} would have caught. The rule is currently disabled.

nudge.message: This project uses Drift Advisor. Install the Saropa Log Capture extension to correlate runtime SQL with these static findings.

activation.backfillComplete: Package Vibrancy: one-time history backfill complete ({count} snapshots imported).
activation.proceedUpgrades: Proceed with {count} upgrade(s)? Failed steps roll back and the plan continues.
activation.notPubspec: Selected file is not a pubspec.yaml.
activation.suppressAllConfirm: Suppress all {count} unhealthy packages? This will hide all diagnostics.
activation.updatePrereleaseConfirm: Update {package} to prerelease {version}? Prereleases may contain breaking changes.
activation.ciRunScanFirst: Run a scan first to generate CI config with appropriate thresholds
activation.compareFetchFailed: Could not fetch enough package data

main.noViolationsRunAnalysis: No violations in current data. Run analysis first.
main.telemetryReset: Saropa Lints: kaugnay na panuntunan telemetry counter reset.

main.openReportFailed: Saropa Lints: failed to open report — {message}
main.noAnalysisData: No analysis data. Run analysis first.
main.setupPrompt: Saropa Lints detected a Dart project without saropa_lints configured. Set up now for 2100+ lint rules.

setup.requiresDartProject: Saropa Lints requires a Dart or Flutter project (no pubspec.yaml found).
setup.pubGetNotResolved: Saropa Lints: pub get succeeded but saropa_lints was not resolved. Check pubspec.yaml formatting.
setup.disabled: Saropa Lints is disabled. Project files were not changed.
setup.noOpenDartFiles: Saropa Lints: no open Dart files found. Re-open a Dart file or turn off the "Open editors only" setting.
setup.scaffoldGateDetail:
This writes a new Dart package under your workspace (pubspec.yaml, lib/main.dart, README): one custom_lint plugin that registers Saropa and leaves hooks for your own rules.

Only use this when you ship custom analyzer rules together with Saropa. Normal Saropa-only projects can skip it—the analyzer allows a single plugin entry per context.

Next: pick a workspace-relative folder. If that folder already exists, you are asked before anything is overwritten.
setup.scaffoldPathOutsideWorkspace: Scaffold path must be inside the workspace folder.
setup.scaffoldFolderExists: Folder already exists: {folder}. Files may be added or overwritten. Continue?
setup.scaffoldCreated: Composite plugin scaffold created. Open generated main.dart?
setup.scaffoldFailedHint: Ensure saropa_lints is in dev_dependencies and run pub get.
